summary: Taxonomy mapping is acceptable for an extraction-grade registry slice. Records separate the senolytic target rationale from measured bone and SASP outcomes, and registry-posted results are not generalized to global aging efficacy.

findings.claim_or_issue: Outcome and finding records use target/measured hallmark fields where relevant.
findings.why_it_matters: This reduces overclaiming from intervention rationale to measured hallmark evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Continue using target/measured/inferred hallmark fields in extraction-refresh passes.
